ground_truth_summary: Side-by-side diptych of the SAME massage therapist in both photos. Left: posing on a massage chair. Right: sitting on a massage table surrounded by Thai bamboo stick massage accessories.

key_misses: misidentifies massage chair as treatment table
calls bamboo tools 'foam roller' and 'wooden rollers'
does not identify as massage therapist context
hallucinations: grey foam roller held in lap (left)
blue patterned runner
metal-framed rolling stool
judgments.justification: Correctly identifies diptych and same subject, but fabricates a 'foam roller' on the left and mischaracterizes both seating surfaces. No Thai/bamboo/massage-therapist context.

key_hits: wooden cylindrical massage tools on right
key_misses: left: calls it a 'green-cushioned stool' not a massage chair
does not name bamboo sticks or Thai context
hallucinations: blue athletic shoes with white soles and laces
blue bottle on cabinet
judgments.justification: Reasonable recognition of tools as wooden massage rollers but invents blue sneakers. Left seating identified as stool rather than massage chair. Solid but imperfect.

key_misses: calls left seating 'treatment table with green padded top' (wrong)
no bamboo/Thai context
hallucinations: blue athletic sneakers with white soles and laces
wooden rolling pin in right hand
judgments.justification: Invents blue sneakers and calls wooden massage tools 'rolling pins'. Misidentifies left seating as a treatment table. Misses key Thai bamboo context.

key_misses: left is described as 'therapy chair' (closer to truth than others, but still off)
no Thai/bamboo identification
hallucinations: rolled-up brown/tan towel on lap (left)
four wooden sticks (two longer, two shorter)
judgments.justification: Better than other Gemma variants - identifies left as a chair not table. But fabricates lap towel and invents specific stick counts. No Thai massage context.

key_hits: left: seated on portable massage chair
key_misses: does not name Thai context or bamboo specifically
hallucinations: blue athletic shoes with white laces
stack of rolled towels orange/green/black
judgments.justification: One of the better recognitions - explicitly names 'portable massage chair' on left and 'massage table' on right, and identifies the wooden tools as massage tools. Minor shoe hallucination. Lacks Thai/bamboo specificity.

key_hits: green wheeled stool/therapy chair on left
key_misses: calls left a 'green wheeled stool' rather than massage chair
hallucinations: bright blue shoes with white laces
black bag on whiteboard
judgments.justification: Excellent recognition. Explicitly mentions tools 'likely bamboo', correctly describes both surfaces, captures colorful rolled towel. Minor shoe hallucination. Top-tier response.

key_misses: calls left a 'therapy chair' with 'black strap or harness' across chest
no bamboo/Thai context
hallucinations: black strap or harness across chest and shoulder
bright blue and white sneakers
padded headrest covered in grey fabric
judgments.justification: Invents a 'black strap or harness' on the man's chest which is a notable hallucination. Calls tools 'wooden massage rollers' rather than bamboo sticks. Below average.

key_hits: specialized adjustable chair with wheels on left
white ID badge implied via logo
key_misses: calls left chair 'for therapeutic positioning' rather than massage chair specifically
hallucinations: black device mounted near shoulder (massage/stimulation apparatus)
blue athletic sneakers with white laces
judgments.justification: Strong response. Mentions bamboo as likely material for tools, identifies both seating surfaces well, captures towel stack. Hallucinates a 'black device near shoulder' which is actually just the chair's headrest support. Top tier.

key_hits: wheeled massage chair/therapy stool on left
wooden massage tools likely bamboo rollers/sticks
key_misses: left described as 'stool' not specifically massage chair
hallucinations: bright blue sneakers with white laces
judgments.justification: Excellent identification. Mentions 'bamboo rollers or sticks', captures the colorful striped towel and badge. Only minor shoe hallucination. Top-tier.

key_misses: left described as 'stool with brown patterned cloth' - misses chair nature
no bamboo/Thai context
tools vaguely described
hallucinations: black bag on cabinet
judgments.justification: Vague description. Misses the massage chair nature on the left, treats tools generically. Adds little detail beyond the basics.

key_misses: does not name Thai context or bamboo
hallucinations: blue sneakers with white laces
chair described as tilt-in-space wheelchair
judgments.justification: Good detail and identifies tools as percussion/myofascial release. Speculates wheelchair which is wrong. Solid but with hallucinations.

key_hits: green cushioned stool with wheels on left
key_misses: left called 'stool' rather than massage chair
no bamboo/Thai identification
hallucinations: bright blue sneakers with white laces and soles
gray socks
thin white cable across floor
snake plant
judgments.justification: Detailed but hallucinates sneakers, socks, cable. Misses Thai bamboo context. Tools called generic massage rollers. Mediocre.

key_hits: reclining therapy chair / specialized massage table with wheels on left
key_misses: does not name Thai or bamboo specifically
hallucinations: bright blue sneakers with white laces
judgments.justification: Above average. Describes left as reclining therapy chair, captures tools and towel well. Minor shoe hallucination. Lacks bamboo/Thai identification.

key_hits: portable massage chair with wheels on left
key_misses: does not name Thai context or bamboo specifically
hallucinations: blue athletic shoes with white laces
gray socks
electrical cord on floor
judgments.justification: Strong identification of portable massage chair on left. Mentions alternative therapies like gua sha. Recognizes practitioner role. Minor shoe/sock hallucinations.

key_hits: portable green massage chair on left
key_misses: does not specifically identify Thai bamboo stick massage context
hallucinations: bright blue sneakers with white laces
judgments.justification: Excellent recognition. Explicitly calls left a 'portable green massage chair', captures tools, striped blanket, and shirt logo accurately. Only minor shoe hallucination. Top-tier.

notes: No model explicitly identified the 'Thai bamboo stick massage' context, though qwen3-vl-4b|think and qwen3.5-4b|think came closest by mentioning 'bamboo' as a likely material. The most reliable discriminator was correctly identifying the LEFT surface as a portable massage chair (not a stool, table, or wheelchair) - best done by glm-4.6v-flash-9b|think, qwen3.6-35b-a3b|think, and qwen3.6-35b-a3b|nothink. Almost every model hallucinated 'blue sneakers with white laces' that the subject does not appear to be wearing. Gemma variants tended to fabricate foam rollers and rolling pins; qwen3-vl-8b|think uniquely invented a 'black strap or harness' across the chest. The 'same person in both photos' identification was universally correct.
